query:
UPDATE adCreatives SET headlineFormula = CASE
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'banned' THEN 'benefit'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'secret' THEN 'social_proof'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'leaked' THEN 'curiosity'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'glitch' THEN 'contrast'
  WHEN headlineFormula = 'forbidden' THEN 'challenge'
  ELSE headlineFormula
END;
